programmes.show_description: Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. When he is imprisoned aboard a CIA submarine under mysterious circumstances, a deep cover operative must join forces with another prisoner to break free. (2018)
Thriller with Richard Dreyfuss. Desperate to find his missing daughter, a former Black Ops soldier goes on a merciless quest for revenge to bring those responsible to justice. (2021)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern martial arts western. The Rangers investigate a series of suspicious accidents involving a Cherokee Indian racing team. S6, Ep14
Hooker and Romano track a dangerous man who attacks unsuspecting female joggers, and try to set a trap for him before he strikes again. S2, Ep5
Alien invasion drama. When a Senator is killed shortly after meeting with Vincent and Scoville an ambitious District Attorney threatens to expose and disband the believers group.
Apocalyptic sci-fi adventure. With a new planet hurtling towards a doomed Earth, a group of scientists build a rocket to take them to safety on a new world. (1951)
Classic sci-fi with Gene Barry. When a deadly alien threat reaches Earth, scientist Clayton Forrester and Sylvia Van Buren are all that stand in the way of total annihilation! (1953)
Thriller based on Frederick Forsyth's novel, with Jon Voight. A journalist tries to discover the new identity of a concentration camp commandant to expose his crimes to the world. (1974)
Kirk's mission to rescue an old flame leaves him prone to inexplicable fits of rage - and almost provokes a mutiny aboard the good ship Enterprise. S3, Ep24/24
Internationally famous physician Dr Rudy Wells relates the series of events leading up to astronaut Steve Austin's horrific accident. S1, Ep1
Hooker hunts a psychotic sniper with a murderous grudge against the police, who is plotting to blow up the precinct. S2, Ep6
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker pitches in to race for the Cherokee Indian racing team... S6, Ep15
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A disgraced narcotics cop-turned-sheriff on the Mexican border gets the chance to prove his worth when an escaped drug lord tries to flee the US. (2012)
Crime thriller with Christian Bale. A steelworker takes matters into his own hands when his younger brother returns from service in Iraq and disappears after getting involved with gangsters. (2013)
Voyeuristic thriller with Hilary Swank. A recently single young doctor moves into a new apartment on her own, unaware that her landlord has a terrifying obsession with her. (2011)
Hammer horror with Christopher Lee. Count Dracula rises from the grave to unleash a plague on the world - but a descendant of the unflappable vampire hunter Van Helsing is hot on his trail. (1973)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Sci-fi action starring Fay Gauthier. Aliens invade Earth and give the planet's population an ultimatum - emigrate to a new planet, or be killed... (2016)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Alien invasion drama. Vincent investigates when a young girl who witnessed an alien's death and vaporisation near to a religious shrine puts the event down to a holy miracle.
When a dying alien wounds a police patrolman, Vincent arrives to investigate but finds that the local authorities are far from cooperative.
An alien woman arranges to meet Vincent to discuss the possibility of defecting and supplying information, however, fellow Invaders are in pursuit determined to silence her.
Alien invasion drama. When a Senator is killed shortly after meeting with Vincent and Scoville an ambitious District Attorney threatens to expose and disband the believers group.
Internationally famous physician Dr Rudy Wells relates the series of events leading up to astronaut Steve Austin's horrific accident. S1, Ep1
Sci-fi thriller remake with Colin Farrell. A man living in a bleak future is forced to become a fugitive when he discovers he is really a spy whose memories have been erased. (2012)
Adaptation of the classic adventure yarn, starring Patrick Swayze as courageous Allan Quatermain, who is employed to locate the mine and uncover the truth behind the legends. Ep1
Adventurer Allan Quatermain plunges into the unexplored recesses of the African jungles to uncover the truth behind the legends concerning the mine. Ep2
In a dystopian future where everyone must undergo an operation to make them identical, one woman desperately tries to hang on to her own identity. S5, Ep17
Three tough-looking men on motorcycles disrupt a peaceful suburb when they move in - yet the neighbours could never imagine just how dangerous these men really are. S5, Ep18
Action comedy with Woody Harrelson. Two New York cops plan to rob a train carrying all the day's takings from the city's subway network, but a pyromaniac serial killer threatens their plans. (1995)
Claustrophobic horror with Olivia Williams. A US submarine crew on a routine mission during WWII descends into madness after an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events. (2002)
